transcript: runtime_scope=source/test/screenshot proof sweep; real purchase, provider secret, external link submission, and destructive disconnect are safe-surface only unless isolated fixtures are added

functional_state.detail: Seeded sales dashboard with representative providers, products, orders, revenue metrics, chart data, empty states, and no real secret submission.

inputs: Open the release-like app on the Mini.
Select Dashboard, Orders, Products, and Settings from the primary navigation.
Verify the selected section renders the expected customer content and preserves window sizing.
output_assertions: Every shipped primary section is reachable from the platform navigation.
Settings routing from in-app and macOS menu entry points lands in the same Settings surface.
No section is a decorative or dead tab.

steps_completed: Open the release-like app on the Mini.
Select Dashboard, Orders, Products, and Settings from the primary navigation.
Verify the selected section renders the expected customer content and preserves window sizing.

functional_state.detail: Seeded sales dashboard with representative providers, products, orders, revenue metrics, chart data, empty states, and no real secret submission.

inputs: Start from a first-launch state.
Exercise Try Demo Data, Unlock Pro, Restore Purchases, and the provider entry surface that appears only after Pro access.
Stop at StoreKit, checkout, or provider credential validation unless an isolated fixture is present.
output_assertions: Demo mode completes without credentials or payment.
Basic/demo does not expose API key entry as a dead end.
LemonSqueezy, Gumroad, and Stripe provider setup surfaces are present after Pro access.
Purchase and restore controls reach the first safe purchase surface only.

steps_completed: Start from a first-launch state.
Exercise Try Demo Data, Unlock Pro, Restore Purchases, and the provider entry surface that appears only after Pro access.
Stop at StoreKit, checkout, or provider credential validation unless an isolated fixture is present.

evidence.detail: Purchase, restore, and provider credential validation are verified only to the first safe surface.

functional_state.detail: Seeded sales dashboard with representative providers, products, orders, revenue metrics, chart data, empty states, and no real secret submission.

inputs: Change Today, 7D, 30D, All, and Custom ranges.
Open and apply the custom range sheet.
Change provider filters and clear them.
output_assertions: Date range state updates shared dashboard and order scopes.
Basic mode routes locked ranges to a visible Pro surface.
Refresh does not run live provider calls without Pro.

steps_completed: Change Today, 7D, 30D, All, and Custom ranges.
Open and apply the custom range sheet.
Change provider filters and clear them.
Refresh data and verify Basic/Pro gates.

functional_state.detail: Seeded sales dashboard with representative providers, products, orders, revenue metrics, chart data, empty states, and no real secret submission.

inputs: Search customer, product, and order identifiers.
Switch provider and date filters.
Open a representative order detail.
output_assertions: Search and filters are scoped to the selected plan and range.
Row navigation opens detail for the selected order only.
Empty-state actions are contextual and do not ask customers to reconnect when a range is simply empty.

steps_completed: Search customer, product, and order identifiers.
Switch provider and date filters.
Open a representative order detail.
Trigger empty-state actions such as refresh, show all providers, connect provider, and unlock Pro.

functional_state.detail: Seeded sales dashboard with representative providers, products, orders, revenue metrics, chart data, empty states, and no real secret submission.

inputs: Open Products with demo or cached data.
Select chart sectors and catalog rows.
Open Refresh Data or Reload Demo, connect provider, and unlock surfaces from empty states.
output_assertions: Chart selection highlights the matching product and can be cleared.
Catalog sorting follows revenue, provider, and product-name order.
Empty states route to provider setup, Refresh Data, or Reload Demo without dead buttons.

steps_completed: Open Products with demo or cached data.
Select chart sectors and catalog rows.
Open Refresh Data or Reload Demo, connect provider, and unlock surfaces from empty states.

functional_state.detail: Seeded sales dashboard with representative providers, products, orders, revenue metrics, chart data, empty states, and no real secret submission.

inputs: Open each provider connection sheet.
Verify secure key entry, help text, Cancel, disabled Save for empty input, and validation error surfaces.
Do not submit real provider secrets unless running an isolated fixture.
output_assertions: Every advertised provider has a safe first setup surface.
API keys are treated as secrets and stored through Keychain paths.
Real provider-secret validation remains blocked unless fixture evidence exists.

steps_completed: Open each provider connection sheet.
Verify secure key entry, help text, Cancel, disabled Save for empty input, and validation error surfaces.
Do not submit real provider secrets unless running an isolated fixture.

evidence.detail: Real provider secrets are not submitted; fixture providers and source guards prove the safe entry surface.

functional_state.detail: Seeded sales dashboard with representative providers, products, orders, revenue metrics, chart data, empty states, and no real secret submission.

inputs: Open Manage for each connected provider fixture.
Verify Change Key routes through the same Pro gate before opening secret entry.
Open Disconnect and cancel unless using isolated temporary credentials.
output_assertions: Destructive disconnect is never one-click destructive.
Change Key does not open secret entry in Basic/demo mode.
Change Key and Disconnect are available only from connected provider rows.
Cached sales data is not removed without confirmation.

steps_completed: Open Manage for each connected provider fixture.
Verify Change Key routes through the same Pro gate before opening secret entry.
Open Disconnect and cancel unless using isolated temporary credentials.

evidence.detail: Disconnect is verified to the confirmation surface; destructive removal is not completed without an isolated fixture.

functional_state.detail: Seeded sales dashboard with representative providers, products, orders, revenue metrics, chart data, empty states, and no real secret submission.

inputs: Open Settings > General.
Toggle menu bar, Dock, and login item controls in a safe fixture.
Open language settings and Check Now update surface.
output_assertions: SaneSales keeps either Dock or menu bar access available.
Menu bar revenue remains Pro-gated.
Sparkle update checks are gated out of App Store builds.

steps_completed: Open Settings > General.
Toggle menu bar, Dock, and login item controls in a safe fixture.
Open language settings and Check Now update surface.
Stop at OS or update UI boundaries.

evidence.detail: OS login item, language settings, and update UI are verified to safe first surfaces.

functional_state.detail: Seeded sales dashboard with representative providers, products, orders, revenue metrics, chart data, empty states, and no real secret submission.

inputs: Toggle demo mode in a fixture and verify cached demo data appears.
Trigger Refresh Data with fixture data.
Export CSV for fixture orders and validate the generated file header.
output_assertions: Demo mode does not grant live provider access.
Refresh respects Basic and Pro gating.
CSV export contains order fields and does not leak secrets.

steps_completed: Toggle demo mode in a fixture and verify cached demo data appears.
Trigger Refresh Data with fixture data.
Export CSV for fixture orders and validate the generated file header.
Stop at share sheet or Finder reveal surface.

evidence.detail: Export is verified by source and fixture file format; share/reveal UI is a safe first surface.

functional_state.detail: Seeded sales dashboard with representative providers, products, orders, revenue metrics, chart data, empty states, and no real secret submission.

inputs: Open Settings > License from primary UI, menu bar, and Dock routes.
Trigger Unlock Pro and Restore Purchases to the first StoreKit or checkout surface.
Open direct license entry where available.
output_assertions: Pro purchase paths are visible and match platform policy.
Real purchases, external checkout, and deactivation are not completed by this sweep.
Review notes describe the same Pro entry points present in code.

steps_completed: Open Settings > License from primary UI, menu bar, and Dock routes.
Trigger Unlock Pro and Restore Purchases to the first StoreKit or checkout surface.
Open direct license entry where available.
Open deactivation only in an isolated Pro fixture.

evidence.detail: StoreKit purchase, external checkout, direct key activation, and deactivation are not completed by this sweep.

functional_state.detail: Seeded sales dashboard with representative providers, products, orders, revenue metrics, chart data, empty states, and no real secret submission.

inputs: Open About.
Open Report a Bug and verify diagnostics are prepared.
Verify external links point at the expected public destinations without submitting anything.
output_assertions: Support and diagnostics paths do not use stale mailto-only flows.
Bug reports include the GitHub bug template and settings summary.
Public privacy and website URLs are available.

steps_completed: Open About.
Open Report a Bug and verify diagnostics are prepared.
Verify external links point at the expected public destinations without submitting anything.

evidence.detail: External website, privacy, and issue links are verified as destinations; no support report is submitted.

functional_state.detail: Seeded sales dashboard with representative providers, products, orders, revenue metrics, chart data, empty states, and no real secret submission.

inputs: Left-click the status item and confirm the main window opens.
Open the status menu and Dock menu.
Verify Open, Refresh, Settings, License, Check for Updates, About / Report a Bug, and Quit availability.
output_assertions: Menu and Dock commands use shared SaneUI utility menu wiring.
Refresh reaches SalesManager refresh.
Settings, License, and About route through queued navigation without timer delays.

steps_completed: Left-click the status item and confirm the main window opens.
Open the status menu and Dock menu.
Verify Open, Refresh, Settings, License, Check for Updates, About / Report a Bug, and Quit availability.
Do not quit except in an isolated end-of-run check.

evidence.detail: Quit is verified as a wired command but is not invoked by this sweep.

functional_state.detail: Seeded sales dashboard with representative providers, products, orders, revenue metrics, chart data, empty states, and no real secret submission.

inputs: Render small, medium, inline, circular, and rectangular supported families.
Verify cached sales values and locked Pro states.
Confirm widgets read the sanitized shared snapshot, not full customer records.
output_assertions: Widget families match platform support.
Locked widgets show Pro requirements without exposing private sales details.
Shared snapshots exclude customer and receipt data.

steps_completed: Render small, medium, inline, circular, and rectangular supported families.
Verify cached sales values and locked Pro states.
Confirm widgets read the sanitized shared snapshot, not full customer records.

functional_state.detail: Seeded sales dashboard with representative providers, products, orders, revenue metrics, chart data, empty states, and no real secret submission.

inputs: Launch the Watch dashboard with cached or demo data.
Verify Today, recent sales, provider rows, and Pro/demo fallback states.
Render watch accessory families from the shared widget provider.
output_assertions: Watch can show demo data when there is no synced snapshot.
Pro-gated data respects SharedStore flags.
Recent rows and provider rows are bounded for watch display.

steps_completed: Launch the Watch dashboard with cached or demo data.
Verify Today, recent sales, provider rows, and Pro/demo fallback states.
Render watch accessory families from the shared widget provider.

functional_state.detail: Seeded sales dashboard with representative providers, products, orders, revenue metrics, chart data, empty states, and no real secret submission.

inputs: Load cached orders, products, and store data.
Simulate corrupt cached payloads and verify recovery.
Verify startup setup only reappears for blank or unusable content.
output_assertions: Offline cache keeps the app useful without provider calls.
Corrupt cache is discarded safely.
Privacy-sensitive order fields stay out of widgets and watch snapshots.

steps_completed: Load cached orders, products, and store data.
Simulate corrupt cached payloads and verify recovery.
Verify startup setup only reappears for blank or unusable content.
Confirm shared snapshots omit customer-identifying fields.
